---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!--
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?
Concrete user story beats abstract framing.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What you'd like to see. Sketch the API / UX / CLI shape if you have one.
"I don't know how it should work, but here's what I want to be able to do" is fine too.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Workarounds, other tools, or alternate designs you weighed.
Helps us understand the shape of the problem.
-->

## Scope check

- Does this affect twin fidelity? <!-- yes / no, and how -->
- Does this affect the recording / replay format? <!-- yes / no -->
- Does this require changes to `@pome-sh/shared-types`? <!-- yes / no -->

## Anything else

<!-- Links, prior art, related tickets. Optional. -->
